TABEEB
AI-Powered Digital Healthcare Platform for Pakistan
Abstract
TABEEB provides a unified, end-to-end digital solution that removes barriers, helping patients while giving doctors a platform to expand their reach.
A comprehensive health platform featuring seamless AI integrations to streamline diagnosis, record-keeping, and both patient and doctor experiences.
Problem Statement
Accessing quality healthcare is challenging due to overburdened public systems, long wait times, and unequal distribution of medical professionals.
Existing healthcare platforms offer fragmented services across multiple platforms with limited integration and patient health records.

📅
Appointment Booking
🎥
Video Consultation
💊

✅

💳

Future Work
AI scribe that auto-drafts clinical notes during video consultations for doctor review.
Pre-consultation AI agent in Urdu and English to collect patient history and symptoms.
Server-side consultation time audit with tamper-proof logs for fair dispute resolution.
